data.title: Reese's alters recipes due to cocoa costs. Grandson of founder criticizes changes in some treats, feeling "embarrassed." #chocolate #candy
data.description: Due to the increased cocoa prices, Hershey’s has decided to modify certain candy recipes. The grandson of the individual credited with creating the original Peanut Butter Cup expressed feeling ashamed of the alterations.

data.description: GitHub Projects has rolled out new features, including search query imports and an improved hierarchy view. Users can now create sub-issues inline and reorder items via drag-and-drop. These enhancements aim to facilitate project organization on the platform.

data.title: Kentucky First Federal Bancorp terminates OCC agreement with First Federal Savings Bank of Kentucky.
data.description: On February 19, 2026, Kentucky First Federal Bancorp, which is under the Nasdaq ticker KFFB and operates First Federal Savings and Loan Association in Hazard and First Federal Savings Bank in Frankfort, Kentucky, revealed that the Office of the Comptroller of the Currency (OCC) has officially ended a formal written agreement with First Federal Savings Bank of Kentucky. The terminated agreement, dated August 13, 2024, was overseen by OCC, the primary regulator of the mentioned bank.

data.title: Packaging distribution market aligned with growth trends - report by BGL indicates positive trajectory for sector.
data.description: A recent report by Brown Gibbons Lang & Company (BGL) states that packaging distributors are effectively capitalizing on the significant growth trends within the sector. Released in Chicago on February 19, 2026, the report underscores the alignment of distributors with key industry advancements. It highlights the lucrative opportunities present in the market and emphasizes the strategic positioning of distributors. With BGL's expertise in investment banking, the report sheds light on the positive outlook for packaging distributors, indicating a promising future for the sector.

data.title: Male birth control options in phase II trials offer non-hormonal methods for men beyond condoms and vasectomy.
data.description: In Los Angeles on February 19, 2026, it was reported that there is a growing demand among men for alternative contraceptive methods beyond condoms and vasectomies. The focus is on non-hormonal options, with particular interest in long-acting reversible methods and short-term, on-demand solutions. NEXT Life...

data.title: Auction Direct USA in Raleigh offers advanced tools to find rare used cars easily, enhancing availability for buyers.
data.description: Auction Direct USA in Raleigh, North Carolina, announced on February 19, 2026, that shoppers can now easily discover rare used cars through their platform. By merging a wide selection of pre-owned vehicles with intuitive online search features, the dealership is simplifying the process for customers. This initiative aims to connect buyers with unique automotive options.

data.title: Meritage Homes raises quarterly cash dividend by 12% to $0.48/share, payable on March 31, 2026 to shareholders.
data.description: Scottsdale, Arizona - On February 19, 2026, Meritage Homes Corporation, identified as MTH on the NYSE and the fifth-largest homebuilder in the United States, declared a quarterly dividend of $0.48 per share. This marks a significant 12% boost from the $0.43 per share dividend paid out in 2025. Shareholders as of the market close on March 17, 2026, will receive this dividend on March 31, 2026.

data.title: Bitcoin's Bollinger Bands narrowing signal potential for a significant price swing, direction TBD.
data.description: Analysts note that the Bollinger Bands indicator has reached its narrowest level ever recorded. This unusual technical pattern is seen as an indication of an imminent significant price movement in a particular direction.

data.title: RSAC 2026 keynote focuses on 'Midnight in the War Room', featuring Easterly, Inglis, Gosler, & Cunningham. HOBOKEN, N.J, Feb. 19, 2026 - Semperis unveils the event.
data.description: A panel discussion at a keynote event highlights the human impacts of cyber warfare featuring Jen Easterly, Chris Inglis, Sarah Gosler, and Chase Cunningham. The event took place in Hoboken, New Jersey on February 19, 2026. Semperis, a company specializing in identity-driven cyber resilience and crisis response, revealed this news.

data.title: Eight attorneys from Dallas' Hamilton Wingo recognized on the 2026 Lawdragon 500 Leading Plaintiff Consumer Lawyers list for personal injury and wrongful death claims.
data.description: In Dallas on February 19, 2026, eight accomplished lawyers from Hamilton Wingo, a prominent law firm, have been acknowledged in the 2026 Lawdragon 500 Leading Plaintiff Consumer Lawyers list. These attorneys specialize in handling significant personal injury cases and wrongful death lawsuits. This accolade highlights their expertise and dedication in the field.

data.title: Omni Hotels & Resorts partners with Canary Technologies to enhance guest engagement at 50+ locations worldwide.
data.description: A renowned hospitality company is enhancing guest communication and engagement at over 50 locations. Canary Technologies, a leading player in hotel guest management technology, disclosed the partnership with Omni Hotels & Resorts. The announcement was made in San Francisco on February 19, 2026.

data.title: Klarna's revenue hits $1.08 billion but faces $26 million loss, leading to stock selloff and legal test.
data.description: Klarna Group PLC, traded on NYSE as KLAR, has faced a challenging situation as its "buy now, pay later" model clashes with tough market conditions post its 2025 IPO. Despite achieving a milestone with its first billion-dollar revenue quarter of $1.08 billion, representing a 38% increase from the previous year and surpassing forecasts, the company recorded a significant $26 million loss, leading to a sharp decline in its stock value due to weaker-than-anticipated guidance. In addition to financial struggles, Klarna is under legal pressure, with a securities class-action lawsuit related to its IPO disclosures expiring on Feb. 20, enabling investors to claim lead plaintiff status. The key concern highlighted by the earnings report is not the revenue growth but the credit quality, which poses potential risks. For more details, refer to the complete article on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Pharmacy expert Stacy Cooper from Wynne, Arkansas, advises patients on prescription transfers in a recent HelloNation article.
data.description: In Wynne, Arkansas, on February 19, 2026, a recent informative article by HelloNation provides essential advice for patients considering transferring a prescription to a different pharmacy. The piece features input from Stacy Cooper of Wynne Apothecary and highlights crucial aspects to consider during this process. Patients can gain valuable insights into how to navigate prescription transfers effectively by familiarizing themselves with this guidance.

data.title: ProShares aims to comply with GENIUS Act by launching Treasury ETF investing in short-term US Treasurys for stablecoin reserves.
data.description: The Exchange-Traded Fund (ETF) focuses solely on short-term US Treasurys, designed specifically for potential utilization by stablecoin issuers in adherence to US reserve regulations.
